issues_open_routine_execution_uq.name: issues_open_routine_execution_uq
issues_open_routine_execution_uq.where:
"issues"."origin_kind" = 'routine_execution'
          and "issues"."origin_id" is not null
          and "issues"."hidden_at" is null
          and "issues"."execution_run_id" is not null
          and "issues"."status" in ('backlog', 'todo', 'in_progress', 'in_review', 'blocked')

issues_active_liveness_recovery_incident.name: issues_active_liveness_recovery_incident_uq
issues_active_liveness_recovery_incident.where:
"issues"."origin_kind" = 'harness_liveness_escalation'
          and "issues"."origin_id" is not null
          and "issues"."hidden_at" is null
          and "issues"."status" not in ('done', 'cancelled')

issues_active_liveness_recovery_leaf_uq.name: issues_active_liveness_recovery_leaf_uq
issues_active_liveness_recovery_leaf_uq.where:
"issues"."origin_kind" = 'harness_liveness_escalation'
          and "issues"."origin_fingerprint" <> 'default'
          and "issues"."hidden_at" is null
          and "issues"."status" not in ('done', 'cancelled')

issues_active_stale_run_evaluation_uq.name: issues_active_stale_run_evaluation_uq
issues_active_stale_run_evaluation_uq.where:
"issues"."origin_kind" = 'stale_active_run_evaluation'
          and "issues"."origin_id" is not null
          and "issues"."hidden_at" is null
          and "issues"."status" not in ('done', 'cancelled')

issues_active_productivity_review_uq.name: issues_active_productivity_review_uq
issues_active_productivity_review_uq.where:
"issues"."origin_kind" = 'issue_productivity_review'
          and "issues"."origin_id" is not null
          and "issues"."hidden_at" is null
          and "issues"."status" not in ('done', 'cancelled')

issues_active_stranded_issue_recovery_uq.name: issues_active_stranded_issue_recovery_uq
issues_active_stranded_issue_recovery_uq.where:
"issues"."origin_kind" = 'stranded_issue_recovery'
          and "issues"."origin_id" is not null
          and "issues"."hidden_at" is null
          and "issues"."status" not in ('done', 'cancelled')
